message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title orderList表示

actor "配達員" as A

participant "Courieridform.jsp" as JSP1
participant "OrderListServlet" as S
participant "CourierDAO" as CDAO
participant "Courier" as C
participant "Session" as SES
participant "OrderDAO" as ODAO
participant "Order" as O
participant "DetailDAO" as DDAO
participant "Detail" as D
participant "Request" as REQ
participant "orderedlist.jsp" as JSP2

A -> JSP1 : courierID入力
JSP1 -> S : リンク
S -> CDAO : findByCourierid()
CDAO -> C : 生成
CDAO --> S : Courier
S -> SES : Courier
S -> ODAO : findAll()
ODAO -> O : 生成
ODAO -> DDAO : findByOrderid()
DDAO -> D : リスト生成
DDAO --> ODAO : ArrayList<Detail>
ODAO -> O : setDetail\n(ArrayList<Detail>)
ODAO --> S : ArrayList<Order>
S -> REQ : setAttribute(ArrayList<Order>)
S -> JSP2 : フォワード
JSP2 -> A : 表示

@enduml
```
